final_prompt.prompt:
Create an interior design illustration of a minimalist Nordic home living room scene.

Style/medium: needs a "极简主义" Nordic interior aesthetic — references in the spirit of Scandinavian mid-century modern movement, MUJI brand identity heritage, 1990s Kinfolk magazine raw-material editorial style; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include a grey fabric sofa, green plants, and a floor lamp as focal elements
Scene/backdrop: must include white walls, light wood flooring, and a large window with sunlight streaming through
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, warm, and cozy atmosphere with natural sunlight — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a clean, bright direction with white and light wood tones — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
